pendingApplications.address: Athol House 67 Old Meeting Street West Bromwich B70 9SR
pendingApplications.proposal: Proposed demolition of building and proposed two storey detached building with front and rear dormers to create 6 flats (5 x 2 bedroom and 1 x 1bedroom), with garden amenity area, bin and cycle storage provision.

pendingApplications.address: 9 And 9A Langley High Street Oldbury B69 4SN
pendingApplications.proposal: Proposed variation of conditions 5a and 6 of planning permission DC/19/63450 (Proposed creation of first floor with front and rear dormer windows to loft space to accommodate 5 apartments above existing retail units, with proposed access and first floor amenity space to rear) Amended position of first floor stairs and walkway to rear to improve access and site functionality with new screening/canopy and low level triggered lighting along walkway and entrance gate.
